title: Cuneiform Tablet #0937: Ur III Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
